source_intake_record.raw_question_text: An enhancement MOSFET of threshold voltage 3 V is being used in the sample and hold circuit shown in <image>. Assume that the substrate of the MOS device is connected to -10 V. If the input voltage \( V_I \) lies between \( \pm 10 \) V, the minimum and maximum values of \( V_G \) required for proper sampling and holding, respectively, are ______.
